command_mac: tell application "System Events" to shut down

log_out.description: Log out of the current user session
command_mac: tell application "System Events" to log out

empty_trash.description: Permanently empty the Trash / Recycle Bin

quit_all_apps.description: Quit all running apps except Finder (macOS only)
command_mac: tell application "System Events" to set quitapps to name of (every process whose background only is false)
if theApp is not "Finder" then tell application theApp to quit
